ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the order was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the sale belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales trend */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
